/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -I/usr/include/qt5 -std=c++14 -fno-permissive -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hud-gtk.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libhud-gtk.so.1 -o libhud-gtk.so.1.0.0 "CMakeFiles/hud-gtk.dir/hud-gtk_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/hud-gtk.dir/manager.c.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-base/hud/src/build/libhud: ../libhud/libhud.so.2.0.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz -Wl,--no-undefined ../libhud/libhud-generated.a -lgio-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgobject-2.0
